fields.listing.name: Listing Name
fields.listing.name_hint: Displayed to attendees on the ticket page
fields.listing.type_hint: Daily listings require attendees to select a specific date when booking
fields.listing.description_placeholder: A short description of the listing
fields.listing.date_hint: When the listing takes place. Times are in your configured timezone.
fields.listing.location_hint: Where the listing takes place. Shown on the ticket page.
fields.listing.max_attendees_hint: For daily listings, this limit applies per date
fields.listing.max_quantity_hint: Maximum tickets a customer can buy in one transaction
fields.listing.bookable_days_hint: Select which days of the week are available for booking
fields.listing.min_days_notice_hint: How many days in advance attendees must book (0 = same day)
fields.listing.max_days_ahead_hint: How far into the future attendees can book (0 = no limit)
fields.listing.booking_duration_hint: How many days each booking reserves. With Customisable Days on, this is the maximum a visitor can choose. Only applies to daily listings unless Customisable Days is on.
fields.listing.customisable_days_hint: Let visitors choose how many days to book (1 up to the Booking Duration above), each priced separately below. Works for standard and daily listings. Cannot be combined with Allow Pay More.
fields.listing.customisable_days_label: Let visitors choose the number of days
fields.listing.contact_fields_hint: Which contact details to collect from attendees
fields.listing.allow_pay_more_hint: Let attendees pay more than the ticket price (the price above becomes a minimum)
fields.listing.allow_pay_more_label: Allow attendees to set their own price
fields.listing.max_price_hint: The maximum price attendees can pay. Must be at least {amount} more than the ticket price.
fields.listing.registration_closes_hint: Leave blank for no deadline. Times are in your configured timezone.
fields.listing.thank_you_url_hint: Leave blank to show a simple success message
fields.listing.webhook_url_hint: Receives POST with attendee name, email, and phone on registration
fields.listing.non_transferable_hint: Requires attendees to show ID matching the ticket name at entry
fields.listing.hidden_hint: Hide from the public listings page and search engines. The listing is still bookable via its direct link.
fields.listing.purchase_only_hint: For items people buy without being checked in, such as raffles, fundraisers, donations, merch, or digital products. Hides QR codes, check-in, and wallet passes. Shows ‘Buy now’ instead of ‘Reserve’.
fields.listing.months_per_unit_hint: How many months one ticket buys. Leave 0 for non-renewal listings.
fields.listing.initial_site_months: Initial Site Months (built site listings only)
fields.listing.initial_site_months_hint: How many months the site stays active after purchase. Required when assigning a built site.
fields.listing.assign_built_site_hint: Automatically assign a built site to each ticket purchased for this listing
fields.listing.slug_hint: URL-friendly identifier (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores). Changing this will break any existing links, embeds, or QR codes that point to this page. Only change if you know what you're doing.
fields.listing.slug_title: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only
fields.listing.image: Listing Image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP — max {size})
fields.login.username_title: Letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only
fields.holiday.name: Holiday Name
fields.holiday.end_date_hint: Must be on or after the start date
fields.built_site.name: Site Name
fields.built_site.assignable_hint: Make this site available for automatic assignment when a ticket is purchased
fields.built_site.updates_hint: Which deploys this site accepts. Alpha takes every release, beta takes beta and stable, release takes stable releases only.
fields.group.name: Group Name
fields.group.description_placeholder: A short description of the group
fields.group.terms_hint: If set, overrides the global terms and conditions for this group ticket page
fields.group.max_attendees_hint: Limits total attendees across all listings in this group. Leave blank for no limit. Works best when all listings in the group are the same type (daily or standard).
fields.group.hidden_hint: Hide from the public listings page and search engines. The group is still bookable via its direct link.
fields.stripe.secret_key_hint: Enter a new key to update
fields.square.location_id_hint: Your Square location ID (found in Square Dashboard under Locations)
fields.square.webhook_key_hint: The signature key from your Square webhook subscription
fields.sumup.api_key_hint: Your SumUp secret API key, from me.sumup.com → For Developers → API Keys
fields.sumup.merchant_code_hint: Your SumUp merchant code, shown in your SumUp account profile (must match the API key's account)
fields.validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
fields.validation.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number
fields.validation.bookable_days_required: At least one day is required
fields.validation.listing_type_invalid: Listing Type must be standard or daily
fields.validation.description_max: Description must be {max} characters or fewer
fields.validation.datetime_invalid: Please enter a valid date and time
fields.validation.address_max: Address must be {max} characters or fewer
fields.validation.special_instructions_m: Special instructions must be {max} characters or fewer
fields.validation.username_min: Username must be at least 2 characters
fields.validation.username_max: Username must be 32 characters or fewer
fields.validation.username_format: Username may only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
fields.validation.username_start: Username may not start with a hyphen or underscore
fields.email.test_subject: Test email from your ticket system
fields.email.test_body: This is a test email. Your email configuration is working correctly.
fields.listing.slug_hint_field: URL-friendly identifier (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores). Changing this will break any existing links, embeds, or QR codes that point to this page. Only change if you know what you're doing.
fields.listing.hidden_hint_group: Hide from the public listings page and search engines. The group is still bookable via its direct link.
fields.listing.contact_fields_hint_html: If you don't collect email addresses, attendees won't be emailed their ticket.
fields.listing.duration_days_hint: How many days each booking reserves. With Customisable Days on, this is the maximum a visitor can choose. Only applies to daily listings unless Customisable Days is on.
fields.validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
fields.validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number
fields.validation.username_chars: Username may only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
fields.validation.days_required: At least one day is required
fields.validation.listing_type: Listing Type must be standard or daily
fields.validation.update_tier: Update channel must be alpha, beta or release
fields.validation.datetime: Please enter a valid date and time
fields.validation.terms_max: Terms must be {max} characters or fewer
fields.validation.duration_whole: Booking Duration (days) must be a whole number
fields.validation.duration_min: Booking Duration (days) must be at least 1
fields.validation.duration_max: Booking Duration (days) must be at most {max}
